text_block_list.text:
One morning, during the New Year's holiday,
Gold City and I come to the shrine thinking it
would be a nice change of scenery. However...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Actually, I should go back.
choice_data_list: You don't want to make a wish?
You don't want to make a wish?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Nope. No wishes here.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wishes won't do a thing for what I lack in skill.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Also, quit trying to do so much for me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's not like stuff like this helps me feel better.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You're worried I'll be trash in the Osaka Hai,
right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You should just pull me out. If we quit now,
then—
choice_data_list: You're not pulling out of the Osaka Hai.
You're not pulling out of the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Then... I don't get it.
choice_data_list: Let's try something other than running today.

text_block_list.text:
I figure forgetting about the race for a moment
might help flip her mood. However...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Something other than running...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: City?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...I can't think of anything.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I just realized I don't have any particular hobbies.

Gold City falls silent. I should offer an idea
instead...
choice_data_list: Why don't we go lie down at the park?
You want to play some video games?

Want to know what it's like to be on the other
side of the lens?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ew, what?
choice_data_list: It'd be relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sure then, I guess... It's not like there's anything
else I want to do.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: What's up?
What's up?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking how nice it feels under the sun.
Coming out here to lie down might not be so bad
an idea, after all...

After saying this, Gold City carefully sits herself
down. And then, in the blink of an eye...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Zzz... zzz...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: Hey, sleepyhead.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...I had a dream.
choice_data_list: What kind?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I was running in an empty meadow.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I gotta... get back to it.

Gold City closes her eyes and sleeps for a bit
longer.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Like?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Music games, racing games, fighting games...
They've got everything.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's all a different world to me, but it might be
nice to try out a new hobby.
choice_data_list: Does anything here interest you?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Oh.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
How about a dance game? I can use my whole
body, so maybe it'll help with my running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Like, it could be a pretty good workout if you do
it seriously. You might even gain some muscle.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Uh-oh.
choice_data_list: Well, it's still technically not running, so...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Actually, let's try the racing game! Here, let's go
against each other.

We enjoy a few games together, steering clear
from the dance ones.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You mean, like, me taking photos of you?
choice_data_list: What?! No, like... scenery and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Right. Yeah, of course. Still, me as a
photographer, huh...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well, shall we go for a walk and try it out then?

Gold City and I decide to take a walk, with
phones in hand.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: No, you're gonna catch me! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: Are they playing tag?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Looks like it. Seems fun.
choice_data_list: Do you want to join them?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What?! No way.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you're so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh?! When did you all get here?

text_block_list.name: Child A
text_block_list.text: You want to play with us? That's okay!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wait, hold on!

text_block_list.name: Child B
text_block_list.text:
It's your turn to run from all of us! You better
hurry! We're coming!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
All of you?! That's not how tag is played—wait! I
didn't agree to this!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh, she's so fast! Come on, everyone! Catch
her!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Can you stop chasing me?! Noooo!
Click!
I manage to get a nice photo at the end.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well, thanks for walking me back.
choice_data_list: Were you able to clear your head?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
A little. It's not like it'll change anything,
though...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Still...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If nothing will change, then I might as well run in
the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You seem so eager to make me enter.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And I don't want to make a fool of myself, since
everyone will be watching.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So...
choice_data_list: Let's train harder this year!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sure, but could you quit it with the extra
enthusiasm already?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Anyway, today was...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Never mind.
